name: @career-ledger/pdf-signature-verifier
description: Private library. Verifies embedded PKCS#7 / PAdES signatures on a PDF: locate the signature dictionary, read ByteRange, hash the covered bytes, parse the CMS SignedData, confirm the digest matches and the signature is cryptographically valid. Does NOT (yet) build a trust chain to AATL roots — that's a follow-up.
